user.title: LESCO Power Smart & CCMS
user.description: Enter your Power Smart credentials and consumer reference. A JWT is obtained automatically on each update; you do not need to paste a token.

data.reference: Reference number (full ref; CCMS uses first 14 digits)

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Power Smart server.
error.invalid_auth: Sign-in failed. Check phone number and password.
